title: REBUILD How will it end Give ME Reis severed arm
display_title: REBUILD How will it end Give ME Reis severed arm
wikitext:
[]: [REBUILD] How will it end? Give ME Rei's severed arm!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 17, 2007 8:41 pm I don't believe there's an article dedicated to discussion of Wevangeliwon's ending yet, which makes sense since it's so far off. The only clues we have toward Rebuild's ending are these: 1) It's going to be different from NGE's ending 2) Rebuild is supposedly going to be closer to the original plan for NGE 3) NGE's originally planned ending was vaguely hinted at in the Proposal. 4) Evangelion has begun in mostly the same way, implying that the conclusion may well be one that is similar to an idea Anno had during the original show's development. So, where does this bring us? The only idea we can extrapolate from this is that of Arka. Yes, I do want to see the Arka ending. Why? Mainly because it's the only way I'll probably ever get to see what Old Century Evangelion's original ending was planned as. Two, because the ruins of an ancient city are the type of thing that intrigue me. We have already seen hints about twelve Angels coming from the moon (the coffin-thing), so I think it may well be possible that we'll get to see Arka. Besides, anything other than Arka, and there's nothing to discuss because there's really no evidence toward anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by machinamar » Mon Sep 17, 2007 9:38 pm Well, you're probably right about the Arqa thing. Also, I remember reading a prediction that Shinji would find happiness in this one (and not ambiguous happiness/hope, a la End of Eva interpretations) seeing as Anno himself is much more content now than he was when Eva first started production, or something like that. Seems likely, no? As a side note, isn't Arqa a reference to one of the sections in the Garden of Eden or something? I recall looking it up (since it was referenced in Persona 3 ... I wasn't lying, indigoangel, that game does rock!) and seeing something about that.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Sep 17, 2007 10:00 pm Don't you guys mean Aluka ?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 17, 2007 10:01 pm No, I think we mean Arkos .

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Sep 17, 2007 10:09 pm How certain are you guys on this name anyway? :? My SAUCE on this: http://www.windsong.demon.co.uk/nge/manyworlds.html The page/site was/is run by Tines-ojichan, don't cha know. Anywho, this is still as a good a possibility as any at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Typhus » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:27 pm Its to soon to gess how its going to end we arent even half way threw the rebuild movies

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:30 pm Stuff will happen. And it will be weird.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Tue Sep 18, 2007 12:21 am It will be hella weird, and I can't remember the last time a work of art made me feel this excited.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Sep 18, 2007 6:46 am What the hell? I've never heard of Arkos, Aluka, Aribica, whatever... Aqua sucks. I need some background information on this... Can anyone give me a good link or article or is it on Tines' site?

[]:             Quote Post by Cone » Tue Sep 18, 2007 7:35 am oooookay... I just read some of the tineÂ´s websiteÂ´s theories, and I just feel dizzy... o.O BUT Even thou I think some of the stuff he said are waaay too.... "psichadelic"... I saw the "original" storyline, and just felt that ot would be cool to see this "aluka" and... Specially the part that shows a overpower angel descending from the moon and destroying everything... I think it would give a nice insight on how "powerless" the humanity really is.

[]: Re: [REBUILD] How will it end? Give ME Rei's severed arm!             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Sep 18, 2007 8:20 am NAveryW wrote: So, where does this bring us? The only idea we can extrapolate from this is that of Arka. Yes, I do want to see the Arka ending. Why? Mainly because it's the only way I'll probably ever get to see what Old Century Evangelion's original ending was planned as. Two, because the ruins of an ancient city are the type of thing that intrigue me. We have already seen hints about twelve Angels coming from the moon (the coffin-thing), so I think it may well be possible that we'll get to see Arka.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Sep 18, 2007 9:01 am Wow... just... wow... That's all some completely new and exciting to me. Like, giddy-inducing. Those are some crazy possibilities and I love the new information there. Bookmark'd! Tines, you freakin rock!

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Sep 18, 2007 11:03 am I tried finding information on this aluka arkos stuff and could not find anything about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 18, 2007 2:59 pm EvaCub wrote: I tried finding information on this aluka arkos stuff and could not find anything about it?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 18, 2007 3:42 pm WOW, I never even noticed how similar that symbol was to the Seele emblem until just now. O_O See, Rebuild had better have a ton of crap like this. Make the main plotline more accessible to general audiences, sure, but LEAVE IN THOSE DETAILS that make you go, "Hey! I didn't notice that the past <any> times I watched this!"

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Tue Sep 18, 2007 4:15 pm So what exactly is this Arkos thing?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 18, 2007 4:18 pm thedarkorb wrote: So what exactly is this Arkos thing?

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Tue Sep 18, 2007 4:26 pm Ah I see. Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 18, 2007 5:00 pm the Newtype article with the transcript of the proposal is about it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 18, 2007 5:59 pm You have some interesting ideas, Sailor, but in my opinion, there should never be an overt romantic relationship between Shinji and anyone else. It is one of those things that should definitely remain ambiguous. Though it was certainly hinted that he had more feelings toward Asuka than anyone else, you just take away one of Evangelion's special things if you take away that ambiguity. Yeah, yeah, causes more pain, whatever. For some reason, though, I really love the line "Painfully reconciled, for lack of a better term, we feel asleep due to exhaustion. After waking up, you brought us to the place you've been staying at upon returning." It feels strangely poetic for some reason, though that's not really the way Asuka talks.
